title: galeopsis × poolii
intro: Galeopsis × poolii, also known as Pool's galeopsis or hybrid galeopsis, is a plant species in the mint family (Lamiaceae) that is a hybrid of two different species. The plant is known to have medicinal properties due to its bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Galeopsis × poolii include its potential anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to alleviate symptoms of various conditions such as digestive issues and respiratory problems. Herbal preparations of Galeopsis × poolii can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and it is often used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health concerns.
